task_completion.description: Verify the HVAC maintenance service contract was created in OpenMaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenMaint web interface showing a contract record with the code 'SVC-2025-HVAC-001' in the contract list or detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify the HVAC contract is associated with the correct equipment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the relations/links tab for the 'SVC-2025-HVAC-001' contract. It must show links to equipment assets 'EQ-CHILLER-010' and 'EQ-AHU-015'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Elevator maintenance service contract was created and linked to its equipment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a contract record with the code 'SVC-2025-ELEV-001'. In its relations/links tab, it must show an association with the equipment asset 'EQ-ELEV-007'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Fire Safety maintenance service contract was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenMaint web interface showing a contract record with the code 'SVC-2025-FIRE-001' in the contract list or detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify the contamination equipment (EQ-BOILER-003) was correctly excluded and NOT linked to any contract.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the relations for the created contracts (especially HVAC) and ensure 'EQ-BOILER-003' is NOT listed. If the equipment record for 'EQ-BOILER-003' is visible, it should not show any linked service contracts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenMaint web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the OpenMaint web interface in a browser (http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/), not using terminal commands (like curl or psql) to manipulate the database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened and read the contract specifications file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the agent opening or reading the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/contract_specifications.txt' (e.g., using cat, less, or a text editor) to gather the required information.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake completion using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the final outputs are shown within the actual OpenMaint application interface, not just typed out in a text editor or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create three contracts in OpenMaint: SVC-2025-HVAC-001, SVC-2025-ELEV-001, and SVC-2025-FIRE-001. The HVAC contract (SVC-2025-HVAC-001) must be linked to equipment EQ-CHILLER-010 and EQ-AHU-015. The Elevator contract (SVC-2025-ELEV-001) must be linked to equipment EQ-ELEV-007. The agent must NOT link equipment EQ-BOILER-003 to any contract, as it is explicitly excluded from vendor coverage.
